name: Swedish Coconut Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Land O Lakes Cookie Collection
In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, sugar, butter, baking powder, baking soda, and vanilla. Beat at low speed, scraping the sides of the bowl often, until well mixed, about 3-4 minutes. Stir in the coconut. Divide the dough into two halves; shape each half into a roll measuring approximately 12 inches long by 2 inches wide. Wrap each roll in waxed paper. Refrigerate until firm, at least 2 hours.
Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Using a sharp knife or cookie cutter, cut the rolls into slices measuring about 1/4 inch thick. Place the slices 2 inches apart on ungreased baking sheets. Bake for 9-14 minutes, or until the edges are lightly browned. Allow to cool slightly before removing from the sheets. Makes approximately 8 dozen cookies.
